safety_prompt.summary: The M1 shell keeps the last operator-visible confirmation prompt on screen even after execution completes.
safety_prompt.body:
Operator confirmation required before real/hybrid arm motion.
- verify wrist-camera framing
- verify desk safe zone clear
- confirm execution token recorded
